positive: A highly stylized, modern minimal forest scene. Central composition featuring bold, geometric silhouette woodland animals (fox, deer, owl) interspersed with stylized botanical elements like abstract ferns, mountain peaks, and simplified birch trees. The color palette is limited to deep forest emerald green, muted indigo blue, and warm burnt orange, providing strong contrast against a creamy off-white background. Focus on clean, graphic lines and flat design principles, perfect for a striking apparel repeat pattern. Cinematic studio lighting, vector illustration quality, maximal contrast, clean print texture.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, messy, grayscale, photo-realistic, logos, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy
